<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Reject Fact"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/gardens/{garden_slug_or_id}/reject"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Reject a quarantined fact (Spec-08-Quarantine-Garden).

Sets confidence = 0.0 and quarantine_status = 'rejected'.
Requires quarantine:moderator or admin role.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
